A test case to verify the subtraction operation in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the correctness of a basic arithmetic operation in JavaScript. It uses the `assert` function to verify that subtracting 1 from 0 results in -1. This test ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly handles subtraction and negative numbers. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on validating this specific arithmetic operation.
